---
title: "scRNA Annotation Method Report: scGPT"
date: today
jupyter: python3
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-expand: 3
    toc-location: left
    html-math-method: katex
    embed-resources: true
    page-layout: full
    html-table-processing: none
    theme: lumen
    fig-width: 10
    fig-height: 5
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{python}
from pathlib import Path
import sys

from IPython.display import Markdown, display
import pandas as pd

LIB_DIR = Path(".").resolve() / "lib"
if str(LIB_DIR) not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(LIB_DIR))

from report_utils import format_table, load_report_context, package_versions_table

ROOT = Path(".").resolve()
context = load_report_context(ROOT)
```

## Current Status

```{python}
display(
    Markdown(
        """
This is a **scaffold report** for a future Python-native **scGPT** backend.
The goal is to keep the report structure ready while treating foundation-model
annotation as an explicitly advanced, research-oriented option.
"""
    )
)
```

```{python}
status_df = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {"field": "method", "value": "scgpt"},
        {"field": "implemented_in_runtime", "value": "no"},
        {"field": "intended_role", "value": "foundation-model-based annotation and mapping"},
        {"field": "selected_in_current_run", "value": "scgpt" in context["selected_methods"]},
    ]
)
format_table(status_df)
```

## Why This Backend Is Different

```{python}
fit_df = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {"consideration": "foundation-model workflow", "impact": "more flexible but operationally heavier than standard classifiers"},
        {"consideration": "checkpoint management", "impact": "requires clear handling of pretrained or fine-tuned weights"},
        {"consideration": "compute cost", "impact": "GPU availability may strongly affect usability"},
    ]
)
format_table(fit_df)
```

## Required Future Inputs

```{python}
planned_df = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {"input": "model checkpoint", "purpose": "pretrained or fine-tuned weights"},
        {"input": "gene vocabulary mapping", "purpose": "align query genes to model vocabulary"},
        {"input": "fine-tuning controls", "purpose": "decide inference-only vs adaptation"},
        {"input": "GPU availability", "purpose": "practical runtime requirement for larger models"},
    ]
)
format_table(planned_df)
```

## Planned Report Contents

```{python}
diagnostics_df = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {"planned_section": "predicted label summary", "content": "cell- and cluster-level annotation output"},
        {"planned_section": "uncertainty review", "content": "confidence or fallback uncertainty summaries"},
        {"planned_section": "cross-method agreement", "content": "compare scGPT to other backends"},
        {"planned_section": "runtime summary", "content": "document resource use and checkpoint provenance"},
    ]
)
format_table(diagnostics_df)
```

## Readiness Checklist

```{python}
checklist_df = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {"task": "define checkpoint/config contract", "status": "pending"},
        {"task": "add vocabulary alignment checks", "status": "pending"},
        {"task": "write scGPT result tables", "status": "pending"},
        {"task": "add method-specific review figures", "status": "pending"},
    ]
)
format_table(checklist_df)
```

## Session Info

```{python}
session_df = package_versions_table(["scanpy", "anndata", "pandas", "numpy", "plotly", "scgpt"])
format_table(session_df)
```
